$comment: The documents prelegal can draft. catalog.json describes the corpus as shipped by Common Paper; this file is the product's view of it — which documents we support, and which Variables the intake chat asks about. Template filenames must match catalog.json.

documents.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
documents.description: A two-way NDA for sharing confidential information while parties explore working together.

fields.name: purpose
fields.label: Purpose
fields.guide: Why the parties are sharing information, as one sentence.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the NDA starts.

fields.name: termMode
fields.label: MNDA Term
fields.guide: "years" if the NDA expires after a fixed number of years, "until_terminated" if it runs until a party ends it.

fields.name: termYears
fields.label: MNDA Term (years)
fields.guide: Whole years the NDA runs for. Only when termMode is "years".

fields.name: confidentialityMode
fields.label: Term of Confidentiality
fields.guide: "years" for a fixed period, "perpetuity" for forever.

fields.name: confidentialityYears
fields.label: Term of Confidentiality (years)
fields.guide: Whole years confidentiality lasts. Only when confidentialityMode is "years".

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: A US state name alone, e.g. "Delaware". Not "Delaware law".

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.label: Jurisdiction
fields.guide: The courts' city or county and state, e.g. "New Castle County, Delaware".

fields.name: modifications
fields.label: MNDA Modifications
fields.guide: Any changes to the standard terms. Omit unless the user asks for one.

documents.name: Cloud Service Agreement
documents.description: For selling or buying a cloud software or SaaS product on a subscription.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company providing the cloud service, e.g. "Acme, Inc.".

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company buying the cloud service.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the agreement starts.

fields.name: subscriptionPeriod
fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.guide: The length of one subscription term as a noun phrase, e.g. "12 months".

fields.name: paymentProcess
fields.label: Payment Process
fields.guide: How and when the Customer pays, e.g. "annually in advance, by invoice, net 30".

fields.name: technicalSupport
fields.label: Technical Support
fields.guide: What support the Provider gives, e.g. "email support during business hours". Leave unset if there is none.

fields.name: generalCapAmount
fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guide: The cap on each party's total liability, e.g. "fees paid in the 12 months before the claim" or "$100,000".

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: The law that governs, as a phrase that reads after "The", e.g. "laws of the State of Delaware".

fields.name: chosenCourts
fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guide: The courts that hear disputes, as a phrase that reads after "in the", e.g. "state and federal courts located in New Castle County, Delaware".

documents.name: Design Partner Agreement
documents.description: For giving an early customer product access in exchange for feedback.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company building the product.

fields.name: partner
fields.label: Partner
fields.guide: Full legal name of the design partner.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the agreement starts.

fields.name: term
fields.label: Term
fields.guide: How long the partnership runs, e.g. "6 months from the Effective Date".

fields.name: program
fields.label: Program
fields.guide: What the partner does in the program, e.g. "weekly feedback calls and access to beta builds".

fields.name: fees
fields.label: Fees
fields.guide: What the Partner pays, if anything. Design partners usually pay nothing — leave unset if so.

fields.name: noticeAddress
fields.label: Notice Address
fields.guide: Where legal notices go for each party — an email or postal address.

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: The law that governs, as a phrase that reads after "The", e.g. "laws of the State of Delaware".

fields.name: chosenCourts
fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guide: The courts that hear disputes, as a phrase that reads after "in the", e.g. "state and federal courts located in New Castle County, Delaware".

documents.name: Service Level Agreement
documents.description: Uptime, support response and service credit terms. Attaches to a Cloud Service Agreement.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company providing the cloud service.

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the customer.

fields.name: subscriptionPeriod
fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.guide: The length of one subscription term as a noun phrase, e.g. "12 months".

fields.name: targetUptime
fields.label: Target Uptime
fields.guide: The monthly availability target as a percentage, e.g. "99.9%".

fields.name: uptimeCredit
fields.label: Uptime Credit
fields.guide: The credit owed when uptime misses the target, e.g. "5% of monthly fees for each 1% below Target Uptime".

fields.name: scheduledDowntime
fields.label: Scheduled Downtime
fields.guide: Maintenance windows that do not count against uptime, e.g. "Sundays 02:00-04:00 UTC, with 48 hours notice".

fields.name: supportChannel
fields.label: Support Channel
fields.guide: Where the Customer sends support requests, e.g. "support@acme.com".

fields.name: targetResponseTime
fields.label: Target Response Time
fields.guide: How quickly the Provider acknowledges a support request, e.g. "1 business day".

fields.name: responseTimeCredit
fields.label: Response Time Credit
fields.guide: The credit owed when a response misses the target, e.g. "2% of monthly fees per missed request".

documents.name: Professional Services Agreement
documents.description: For consulting, implementation or training work delivered under a statement of work.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company doing the work.

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company buying the work.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the agreement starts.

fields.name: sowTerm
fields.label: SOW Term
fields.guide: How long the statement of work runs, e.g. "from the Effective Date until the Deliverables are accepted".

fields.name: fees
fields.label: Fees
fields.guide: What the Customer pays, e.g. "$50,000 fixed fee" or "$200 per hour".

fields.name: paymentPeriod
fields.label: Payment Period
fields.guide: How long the Customer has to pay an invoice, e.g. "30 days".

fields.name: deliverables
fields.label: Deliverables
fields.guide: What the Provider hands over, e.g. "a migration plan and a configured staging environment".

fields.name: generalCapAmount
fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guide: The cap on each party's total liability, e.g. "fees paid under the SOW" or "$100,000".

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: The law that governs, as a phrase that reads after "The", e.g. "laws of the State of Delaware".

fields.name: chosenCourts
fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guide: The courts that hear disputes, as a phrase that reads after "in the", e.g. "state and federal courts located in New Castle County, Delaware".

documents.name: Data Processing Agreement
documents.description: GDPR-style terms for a vendor processing personal data on a customer's behalf.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the vendor processing the personal data.

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company whose personal data is processed.

fields.name: agreement
fields.label: Agreement
fields.guide: The contract this DPA attaches to, e.g. "the Cloud Service Agreement dated 1 March 2026".

fields.name: natureAndPurposeOfProcessing
fields.label: Nature and Purpose of Processing
fields.guide: Why the personal data is processed, e.g. "hosting and supporting the Customer's CRM records".

fields.name: categoriesOfPersonalData
fields.label: Categories of Personal Data
fields.guide: What kinds of personal data, e.g. "names, email addresses, IP addresses".

fields.name: categoriesOfDataSubjects
fields.label: Categories of Data Subjects
fields.guide: Whose data it is, e.g. "the Customer's employees and end users".

fields.name: durationOfProcessing
fields.label: Duration of Processing
fields.guide: How long processing lasts, e.g. "for the term of the Agreement".

fields.name: providerSecurityContact
fields.label: Provider Security Contact
fields.guide: Where the Customer reports security issues, e.g. "security@acme.com".

fields.name: governingMemberState
fields.label: Governing Member State
fields.guide: The EEA member state whose law governs, e.g. "Ireland". Only relevant when the GDPR applies.

documents.name: Software License Agreement
documents.description: For licensing on-premise or downloadable software.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company licensing out the software.

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company licensing the software.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the licence starts.

fields.name: subscriptionPeriod
fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.guide: The length of one licence term as a noun phrase, e.g. "12 months".

fields.name: licenseLimits
fields.label: License Limits
fields.guide: How much use the licence allows, e.g. "up to 50 named users on one production instance".

fields.name: paymentProcess
fields.label: Payment Process
fields.guide: How and when the Customer pays, e.g. "annually in advance, by invoice, net 30".

fields.name: generalCapAmount
fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guide: The cap on each party's total liability, e.g. "fees paid in the 12 months before the claim".

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: The law that governs, as a phrase that reads after "The", e.g. "laws of the State of Delaware".

fields.name: chosenCourts
fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guide: The courts that hear disputes, as a phrase that reads after "in the", e.g. "state and federal courts located in New Castle County, Delaware".

documents.name: Partnership Agreement
documents.description: For a strategic partnership: scope, obligations, brand use and revenue share.

fields.name: company
fields.label: Company
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company whose product is being partnered on.

fields.name: partner
fields.label: Partner
fields.guide: Full legal name of the partner.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the partnership starts.

fields.name: endDate
fields.label: End Date
fields.guide: The date the partnership ends.

fields.name: obligations
fields.label: Obligations
fields.guide: What each party commits to do, e.g. "Partner will resell the Company's product; Company will provide training and leads".

fields.name: territory
fields.label: Territory
fields.guide: Where the partnership applies, e.g. "the United States and Canada". Leave unset if worldwide.

fields.name: paymentSchedule
fields.label: Payment Schedule
fields.guide: What is paid and when, e.g. "20% of net revenue, paid quarterly in arrears".

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: The law that governs, as a phrase that reads after "The", e.g. "laws of the State of Delaware".

fields.name: chosenCourts
fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guide: The courts that hear disputes, as a phrase that reads after "in the", e.g. "state and federal courts located in New Castle County, Delaware".

documents.name: Pilot Agreement
documents.description: A short trial letting a prospective customer evaluate a product before committing.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company providing the product.

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company running the pilot.

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the pilot starts.

fields.name: pilotPeriod
fields.label: Pilot Period
fields.guide: How long the pilot runs, e.g. "60 days from the Effective Date".

fields.name: generalCapAmount
fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guide: The cap on each party's total liability, e.g. "$10,000". Pilots are often unpaid, so a small fixed amount is common.

fields.name: noticeAddress
fields.label: Notice Address
fields.guide: Where legal notices go for each party — an email or postal address.

fields.name: governingLaw
fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guide: The law that governs, as a phrase that reads after "The", e.g. "laws of the State of Delaware".

fields.name: chosenCourts
fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guide: The courts that hear disputes, as a phrase that reads after "in the", e.g. "state and federal courts located in New Castle County, Delaware".

documents.name: Business Associate Agreement
documents.description: HIPAA terms for a vendor handling protected health information for a covered entity.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the business associate — the vendor handling the PHI.

fields.name: company
fields.label: Company
fields.guide: Full legal name of the covered entity whose PHI is handled.

fields.name: baaEffectiveDate
fields.label: BAA Effective Date
fields.guide: The date the BAA starts.

fields.name: agreement
fields.label: Agreement
fields.guide: The contract this BAA attaches to, e.g. "the Cloud Service Agreement dated 1 March 2026".

fields.name: breachNotificationPeriod
fields.label: Breach Notification Period
fields.guide: How quickly the Provider must report a breach, e.g. "5 business days".

fields.name: limitations
fields.label: Limitations
fields.guide: Restrictions on what the Provider may do with PHI — subcontracting, offshoring, de-identifying, aggregating. Leave unset if there are none.

documents.name: AI Addendum
documents.description: AI-specific terms — model training, input and output ownership. Attaches to a Cloud Service or Software License Agreement.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company providing the AI services.

fields.name: customer
fields.label: Customer
fields.guide: Full legal name of the company using the AI services.

fields.name: trainingData
fields.label: Training Data
fields.guide: What data the Provider may train models on. Leave unset if training is not permitted — that is the template's default.

fields.name: trainingPurposes
fields.label: Training Purposes
fields.guide: What the Provider may train for, e.g. "improving the Customer's own dedicated model". Only when Training Data is set.

fields.name: trainingRestrictions
fields.label: Training Restrictions
fields.guide: Limits on training, e.g. "no training on Personal Data; no sharing of trained models with other customers".

fields.name: improvementRestrictions
fields.label: Improvement Restrictions
fields.guide: Limits on using Input and Output to improve the AI system short of training, e.g. "aggregated and de-identified data only".
